quick_skim.title: Finding the Time to Think: Learning Planning Budgets in Real-Time RL
quick_skim.abstract: Deliberating takes time. In real-time settings, that time is not free. Standard reinforcement learning (RL) sidesteps this as the environment waits indefinitely for the agent's decision. Instead, we study real-time RL environments where the environment progresses while waiting for the agent's action. Building on prior real-time formalizations, we introduce variable-delay real-time RL, where the agent chooses how long to deliberate at each decision point since the environment progresses. For the planning agents we use, the right delay is state-dependent, and naively planning how long to plan can paralyze the agent. We instead approach this setting by training a lightweight gating policy on top of a planner to select state-dependent planning budgets. Across real-time Pac-Man, Tetris, Snake, Speed Hex, and Speed Go, our gating policy outperforms fixed-budget and heuristic baselines, and transfers to a real-time setup where the environment and agent run on two different GPUs.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Learning planning budgets in real-time RL enables agents to decide deliberation time, applicable to time-pressured game AI training.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 实时强化学习中的规划预算学习使智能体能够决定思考时间，适用于有时间压力的游戏AI训练。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 实时强化学习中的规划预算学习使智能体能够决定思考时间，适用于有时间压力的游戏AI训练。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 实时强化学习中的规划预算学习使智能体能够决定思考时间，适用于有时间压力的游戏AI训练。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Addresses real-time RL where the environment progresses during agent deliberation. Proposes learning a gating policy to dynamically allocate planning time, beneficial for training game AI agents that must act under time pressure.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对标准强化学习忽略实时决策时间成本的问题，提出可变延迟实时强化学习框架，通过训练轻量级门控策略为规划器分配状态依赖的规划预算，使智能体能够动态权衡思考与行动。实验证明该方法能平衡决策质量与时间开销，为实时游戏AI的训练提供了可行思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对标准强化学习忽略实时决策时间成本的问题，提出可变延迟实时强化学习框架，通过训练轻量级门控策略为规划器分配状态依赖的规划预算，使智能体能够动态权衡思考与行动。实验证明该方法能平衡决策质量与时间开销，为实时游戏AI的训练提供了可行思路。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: reinforcement learning techniques for training game AI

quick_skim.title: Towards Scalable Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning with Large Decision Models
quick_skim.abstract: Recent progress in large-scale sequence modeling has shown that a single model can learn useful representations across highly diverse data distributions. Inspired by these advances, we investigate whether a unified transformer policy can be trained across large collections of heterogeneous reinforcement learning environments.   We introduce LDM-v0, a Large Decision Model trained offline on trajectories collected from thousands of environments spanning multiple domains and modalities. LDM-v0 is a multi-task, multi-modal transformer policy conditioned on histories of observations, actions, rewards, and termination signals, and trained through supervised next-action prediction over offline trajectories. We describe the environment infrastructure, automated data generation pipeline, model architecture, and training methodology used to build LDM-v0, and evaluate its performance across diverse environments. We show that a single pretrained model matches the performance of independently trained task-specific reference policies on approximately 1,000 environments including robotics, autonomous driving, inventory management, cybersecurity, trading, and video games. These results demonstrate the feasibility of large-scale offline pretraining across heterogeneous reinforcement learning environments using a single transformer policy.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Presents a Large Decision Model trained on diverse RL environments, which can serve as a foundation for multi-game AI training.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提出在多样RL环境上训练的大决策模型，可作为多游戏AI训练的基础。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提出在多样RL环境上训练的大决策模型，可作为多游戏AI训练的基础。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提出在多样RL环境上训练的大决策模型，可作为多游戏AI训练的基础。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces LDM-v0, a multi-task transformer policy trained on thousands of environments, enabling scalable multi-task RL. This approach can be leveraged to build game-playing agents that generalize across many games.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对异构环境多任务强化学习的扩展性问题，提出大决策模型LDM-v0，通过离线轨迹预测训练统一Transformer策略。在数千种环境中展示了跨域泛化能力，为开发跨游戏通用AI bot提供了可能的预训练方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对异构环境多任务强化学习的扩展性问题，提出大决策模型LDM-v0，通过离线轨迹预测训练统一Transformer策略。在数千种环境中展示了跨域泛化能力，为开发跨游戏通用AI bot提供了可能的预训练方案。
